setting: 友人Bが、いつも振り回されてボロボロになっている友人Aに対して忠告するが、Aは「わかってるけど抜け出せない」と吐露する恋バナ。
lyrics:
She's toxic for the thrill of it
Bad news but I'm into it, she's all mine
I chase that dragon all the time
She knows how to reel me in
Use me up and she's gone again, oh, my
I stick around just for the high

Your touch is my favorite drug
Fiending for a faded love
I'm gone, all for you

Take me to euphoria, euphoria
I need you in my veins
I crave the sweet escape of euphoria, euphoria
I try to walk away
'Cause if I stay you'll be the death of me

I know there's no such thing as a free ride
(I do, I do, I do)
But when it comes to you I'm down to pay the price
Got me cut wide open, girl, I'm bleeding
(I do, I do, I do)
Just want you to kiss me and put me to sleep

Your touch is my favorite drug
Fiending for a faded love
I'm gone, all for you

Take me to euphoria, euphoria
I need you in my veins
I crave the sweet escape of euphoria, euphoria
I try to walk away
'Cause if I stay you'll be the death of me

Yeah, yeah, yeah
Euphoria, euphoria
I try to walk away
'Cause if I stay you'll be the death of me
Yeah, yeah, yeah, yeah, yeah, yeah

lyricsJa.en: She's toxic for the thrill of it
lyricsJa.ja: 彼女はただスリルを求めて毒をまく

lyricsJa.en: Bad news but I'm into it, she's all mine
lyricsJa.ja: 厄介な存在だけど僕は夢中だ、彼女は僕だけのもの

lyricsJa.en: I chase that dragon all the time
lyricsJa.ja: 僕は四六時中その幻を追いかけている

lyricsJa.en: She knows how to reel me in
lyricsJa.ja: 彼女は僕を誘い込む術を知っているんだ

lyricsJa.en: Use me up and she's gone again, oh, my
lyricsJa.ja: 僕を使い果たしてはまた消えてしまう、なんてことだ

lyricsJa.en: I stick around just for the high
lyricsJa.ja: その快楽のためだけに、僕は離れられずにいる

lyricsJa.en: Your touch is my favorite drug
lyricsJa.ja: 君の感触は僕の一番お気に入りのドラッグだ

lyricsJa.en: Fiending for a faded love
lyricsJa.ja: 色あせた愛を激しく求めている

lyricsJa.en: I'm gone, all for you
lyricsJa.ja: 僕はもう正気じゃない、すべて君のせいだ

lyricsJa.en: Take me to euphoria, euphoria
lyricsJa.ja: ユーフォリア（幸福感）へ連れて行って

lyricsJa.en: I need you in my veins
lyricsJa.ja: 血管の中に君が必要なんだ

lyricsJa.en: I crave the sweet escape of euphoria, euphoria
lyricsJa.ja: ユーフォリアという甘い逃避を渇望している

lyricsJa.en: I try to walk away
lyricsJa.ja: 立ち去ろうとはしてみるけれど

lyricsJa.en: 'Cause if I stay you'll be the death of me
lyricsJa.ja: ここにいれば、君に破滅させられてしまうから

lyricsJa.en: I know there's no such thing as a free ride
lyricsJa.ja: タダで手に入るものなんてないと分かっている

lyricsJa.en: (I do, I do, I do)
lyricsJa.ja: （分かってる、分かってるんだ）

lyricsJa.en: But when it comes to you I'm down to pay the price
lyricsJa.ja: でも君のこととなれば、代償を払う覚悟はある

lyricsJa.en: Got me cut wide open, girl, I'm bleeding
lyricsJa.ja: 切り裂かれて、僕は血を流しているんだ

lyricsJa.en: (I do, I do, I do)
lyricsJa.ja: （そうなんだ、分かってる）

lyricsJa.en: Just want you to kiss me and put me to sleep
lyricsJa.ja: ただ君にキスされて、眠らせてほしいだけ

lyricsJa.en: Your touch is my favorite drug
lyricsJa.ja: 君の感触は僕の一番お気に入りのドラッグだ

lyricsJa.en: Fiending for a faded love
lyricsJa.ja: 色あせた愛を激しく求めている

lyricsJa.en: I'm gone, all for you
lyricsJa.ja: 僕はもう正気じゃない、すべて君のせいだ

lyricsJa.en: Take me to euphoria, euphoria
lyricsJa.ja: ユーフォリアへ連れて行って

lyricsJa.en: I need you in my veins
lyricsJa.ja: 血管の中に君が必要なんだ

lyricsJa.en: I crave the sweet escape of euphoria, euphoria
lyricsJa.ja: ユーフォリアという甘い逃避を渇望している

lyricsJa.en: I try to walk away
lyricsJa.ja: 立ち去ろうとはしてみるけれど

lyricsJa.en: 'Cause if I stay you'll be the death of me
lyricsJa.ja: ここにいれば、君に破滅させられてしまうから

lyricsJa.en: Yeah, yeah, yeah
lyricsJa.ja: Yeah, yeah, yeah

lyricsJa.en: Euphoria, euphoria
lyricsJa.ja: ユーフォリア、至福の場所

lyricsJa.en: I try to walk away
lyricsJa.ja: 立ち去ろうとはしてみるけれど

lyricsJa.en: 'Cause if I stay you'll be the death of me
lyricsJa.ja: ここにいれば、君に破滅させられてしまうから

lyricsJa.en: Yeah, yeah, yeah, yeah, yeah, yeah
lyricsJa.ja: Yeah, yeah, yeah, yeah, yeah, yeah

conversation.speaker: B
conversation.japanese: すごく疲れてるね。まだ彼女と付き合ってるの？彼女は厄介だってわかってるだろ。

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: My friends tell me she's toxic, but I'm just so into it.
sentences.displayHtml: My friends tell me she's toxic, but I'm just so into it.

conversation.japanese: わかってる、わかってるよ。友達も彼女は毒みたいって言うけど、どうしても夢中なんだ。

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: She only calls you when she needs something.
sentences.displayHtml: She only calls you when she needs something.

sentences.text: She'll use you up and leave again.
sentences.displayHtml: She'll use you up and leave again.

conversation.japanese: 彼女は何か必要な時だけ君に連絡してくるじゃないか。君を都合よく使い果たして、またいなくなるぞ。

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: I've tried to walk away so many times, but she always knows how to reel me in.
sentences.displayHtml: I've tried to walk away so many times, but she always knows how to reel me in.

conversation.japanese: 何度も離れようとしてみたんだけど、彼女は僕をどう引き戻せばいいか熟知してるんだ。

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: You can't keep living like this.
sentences.displayHtml: You can't keep living like this.

sentences.text: If you stay, the stress will be the death of you.
sentences.displayHtml: If you stay, the stress will be the death of you.

conversation.japanese: こんな生活続けられないよ。もしこのままいたら、ストレスで君がダメになっちゃうぞ。

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: I get it, there's no free ride.
sentences.displayHtml: I get it, there's no free ride.

sentences.text: I'm completely drained, but her text is like my favorite drug.
sentences.displayHtml: I'm completely drained, but her text is like my favorite drug.

conversation.japanese: わかってる、代償なしなんてないって。完全に疲れ切ってるのに、彼女からのメッセージは最高の中毒みたいなんだ。

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: You're bleeding yourself dry for a faded love.
sentences.displayHtml: You're bleeding yourself dry for a faded love.

sentences.text: You need to cut her off completely.
sentences.displayHtml: You need to cut her off completely.

conversation.japanese: 色褪せた愛のために、自分で自分をすり減らしてるじゃないか。彼女とは完全に縁を切らなきゃダメだ。

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: I'll try one more time to delete her number.
sentences.displayHtml: I'll try one more time to delete her number.

sentences.text: I just crave that sweet escape too much.
sentences.displayHtml: I just crave that sweet escape too much.

conversation.japanese: もう一回、彼女の番号を消す努力をしてみるよ。ただ、あの甘い逃避をどうしても求めてしまって…。
